export const translations: Record<string, Record<string, any>> = {
  en: {
    nav: {
      dashboard: "Dashboard",

      calendar: "e-Time",

      messaging: "e-Comm",
      institute: "Digi\nDelivery",

      docs: "Docs",
      intelligence_hub: "Intelligence Hub",

      cancel_btn: "Cancel",

      act_title: "Action Title",
      assign: "Assign To Owner",
      due: "Due Date",
